title: tragacantha megalantha
intro: Tragacantha megalantha, also known as the milk thistle, is a biennial or perennial flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of liver and gallbladder disorders, due to its high concentration of silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of tragacantha megalantha include reducing inflammation, protecting against liver damage, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. Tragacantha megalantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, with the most common preparation being a standardized extract of silymarin.
